description: Etienne from Binance Research discusses the November 2019 global markets overview, highlighting the performance of Monero and Cardano, Bitcoin's price fluctuations, and developments in DeFi and margin trading.
topic_summary: In November 2019, Monero and Cardano were top performers despite price drops. Bitcoin fell from $9200 to $7600. DeFi saw new highs in ETH locked, while Maker launched multi-collateral DAI. New assets were listed on Binance, and margin trading expanded with IOTA and Tezos. Staking gained relevance with 12 supported assets.
